title: Refresh reuses graph builds and stays lightweight
summary: Refresh should reuse the code and knowledge graph objects produced during indexing and report lightweight metrics only. Full quality and benchmark calculations belong in the explicit metrics or benchmark commands because
body:
Refresh should reuse the code and knowledge graph objects produced during indexing and report lightweight metrics only. Full quality and benchmark calculations belong in the explicit metrics or benchmark commands because running them inside refresh multiplies graph rebuilds and recall work.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; /usr/bin/time -p node mcp/dist/cli.js refresh --project . --json
